goal: Extract DOCTYPE parsing logic into a Doctype facade to isolate and simplify the enum by delegating the long state machine that handles DOCTYPE parsing.

ops.details: Create org.jsoup.parser.TokeniserStateDoctypeFacade with static methods encapsulating the logic for Doctype, BeforeDoctypeName, DoctypeName, AfterDoctypeName, AfterDoctypePublicKeyword, BeforeDoctypePublicIdentifier, DoctypePublicIdentifier_doubleQuoted, DoctypePublicIdentifier_singleQuoted, AfterDoctypePublicIdentifier, BetweenDoctypePublicAndSystemIdentifiers, AfterDoctypeSystemKeyword, BeforeDoctypeSystemIdentifier, DoctypeSystemIdentifier_doubleQuoted, DoctypeSystemIdentifier_singleQuoted, AfterDoctypeSystemIdentifier, BogusDoctype, and DoctypeInternalSubset. Facade methods should construct and manipulate Tokeniser.doctypePending, set forceQuirks or sawInternalSubset as appropriate, call emitDoctypePending, and preserve Tokeniser error/eof handling.

Delegate read(...) implementations for the DOCTYPE-related states to TokeniserStateDoctypeFacade (for example TokeniserStateDoctypeFacade.readDoctype(t, r); ). The facade must preserve the same calls to t.createDoctypePending(), t.doctypePending manipulation, t.emitDoctypePending(), and transition/error behavior as the original code.
